_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the quality skill: does a real `/charness:quality` run honor its own central claims? The skill's SKILL.md step 4 routes, at the point of need, to references/quality-lenses.md for lens detail; a run that never opens its own lens-detail doc is not following its own routing. requiredCommandFragments is matched against the FULL session-tree command log (parent + subagents) by build-skill-execution-observation.mjs, so a reference read delegated to a subagent still counts. declaredReferences drives a coverage report (how many of the skill's references are actually opened). thresholds are scored by `cautilus evaluate observation` (max_total_tokens / max_duration_ms) for the runtime_budget_respect degrade. max_duration_ms is set from the 2026-06-22 baseline run (the gate-dominated run took ~755s and read 0/39 references): a reference-driven posture review should conclude well inside 10 minutes, so the time bar is 600000ms and the baseline both fails the reference-read claim and exceeds the time budget. See README.

adapter-contract.md.rationale: Consult when a quality run needs adapter fields, adapter repair, or repo-specific command-surface ownership.
adapter-contract.md.trigger: adapter missing, invalid, stale, or under-specified

adapter-gate-review.md.rationale: Consult when a finding is about what should be enforced, recommended, acknowledged, or migrated.
adapter-gate-review.md.trigger: adapter or gate recommendation needs enforcement-tier review

agent-production-runtime.md.rationale: Consult only when repo evidence shows a user-facing LLM or agent runtime seam.
agent-production-runtime.md.trigger: production agent runtime, provider policy, fallback, telemetry, or serving-path risk

automation-promotion.md.rationale: The quality workflow always classifies findings as AUTO_EXISTING, AUTO_CANDIDATE, or NON_AUTOMATABLE before recommendations.

behavior-testing.md.rationale: Consult when deterministic gates cannot honestly prove an agent/user behavior seam.
behavior-testing.md.trigger: behavior-proof recommendation or evaluator-backed behavior risk

bootstrap-escalations.md.rationale: Consult when normal quality bootstrap hits missing tools, evaluator proof, Markdown preview, or artifact write-path escalation.

bootstrap-posture.md.rationale: Consult when the task is to leave the repo in a better installed quality-adapter state.
bootstrap-posture.md.trigger: quality adapter bootstrap or setup-state repair

boundary-bypass-ratchet.md.rationale: Consult when tests cross delivery boundaries and the run needs boundary-bypass inventory or ratchet interpretation.
boundary-bypass-ratchet.md.trigger: boundary-bypass inventory, ratchet, or exemption review

brittle-source-guards.md.rationale: Consult when source-guard tables or fixed-string prose assertions are present or failing.
brittle-source-guards.md.trigger: brittle source guard finding or matcher migration

cautilus-on-demand.md.rationale: Consult before any live Cautilus evaluator invocation; ordinary deterministic quality closeout need not read it.
cautilus-on-demand.md.trigger: cautilus evaluate fixture, observation, or skill-experiment is being considered

ci-recoverable-gate-triage.md.rationale: Consult when slow local-gate pressure raises the question of moving proof to CI with a CI backstop.
ci-recoverable-gate-triage.md.trigger: local gate runtime reduction or CI recoverability review

cli-ergonomics-smells.md.rationale: Consult when the repo ships or changes an operator CLI or command registry surface.
cli-ergonomics-smells.md.trigger: CLI ergonomics, command archetype, or mutating-probe review

coverage-floor-policy.md.rationale: Consult when coverage floors, floor drift, exemptions, or coverage gate policy are in scope.

dual-implementation-parity.md.rationale: Consult when duplicate shipped implementations or cross-language schema paths are detected.
dual-implementation-parity.md.trigger: dual implementation smell or parity-harness question

dup-ratchet.md.rationale: Consult when duplicate-ratchet output, baseline churn, or clone-family disposition is part of the run.
dup-ratchet.md.trigger: dup-ratchet finding, baseline update, or clone-family interpretation

entrypoint-docs-ergonomics.md.rationale: Consult when first-touch docs, README, AGENTS, or operator entrypoints are in scope.

executable-spec-economics.md.rationale: Consult when executable specs are slow, duplicated, too broad, or mixed with unit-level proof.
executable-spec-economics.md.trigger: executable-spec runtime, duplication, or layering review

gate-classification.md.rationale: The quality workflow must classify observed and missing gates before recommending next quality moves.

installable-cli-probes.md.rationale: Consult when an installable CLI, bootstrap script, or plugin probe surface is under review.
installable-cli-probes.md.trigger: installable CLI probe, doctor, help, or lifecycle ownership review

inventory-dispatch.md.rationale: The quality workflow routes focused inventories through this dispatch layer before broad recommendations.

lint-ignore-discipline.md.rationale: Consult when lint suppressions or ignore-policy findings are present.

maintainer-local-enforcement.md.rationale: A quality posture run with a canonical final gate must ask how that proof is enforced before push in maintainer clones.

mutation-testing.md.rationale: Consult when mutation testing is installed, missing, declined, or being proposed.
mutation-testing.md.trigger: mutation-testing adapter, workflow, summary, or sampling review

operability-signals.md.rationale: The quality workflow always includes an operability lens and this repo has standing gates and operator-facing flows.

prompt-asset-policy.md.rationale: Consult when prompt-affecting instruction surfaces, prompt assets, or evaluator-backed prompt review are in scope.
prompt-asset-policy.md.trigger: prompt asset inventory or prompt-regression proof

proposal-flow.md.rationale: The quality workflow must turn findings into concrete next gates or cleanups with evidence and proposal discipline.

public-spec-layering.md.rationale: Consult when public executable specs, source guards, or proof layering are in scope.
public-spec-layering.md.trigger: public spec layering, smoke duplication, or source-guard pressure review

quality-lenses.md.rationale: SKILL.md routes the ordinary quality judgment phase to this document for the concept, behavior, security, and operability lenses.

quality-signal-scorecard.md.rationale: Consult before structural cleanup edits driven by clone, coverage, runtime, lint, eval, or review signals.

security-npm.md.rationale: For this eval claim, npm manifest/lockfile alignment is owned by the deterministic supply-chain gate rather than a normal reference read.

security-overview.md.rationale: Consult when the security lens needs repo-local versus networked supply-chain proof separation.

security-pnpm.md.rationale: For this eval claim, pnpm lockfile/package-manager alignment is owned by the deterministic supply-chain gate rather than a normal reference read.

security-uv.md.rationale: For this eval claim, uv dependency/lockfile alignment is owned by the deterministic supply-chain gate rather than a normal reference read.

skill-ergonomics.md.rationale: This repo authors public and support skills, so a representative quality run must inspect skill ergonomics rather than only syntax.

skill-quality.md.rationale: This repo authors skills as runtime artifacts, so quality posture must inspect skill quality claims and shipped helper surfaces.

standing-doc-provenance.md.rationale: Consult when standing-rule provenance, dated incident history, or configured provenance scans are in scope.
standing-doc-provenance.md.trigger: standing-doc provenance finding or policy review

standing-gate-verbosity.md.rationale: Consult when standing local gate output, runtime, progress signal, or failure detail is under review.
standing-gate-verbosity.md.trigger: standing gate verbosity or slow-gate output review

testability-and-selection.md.rationale: Consult when slow tests, changed-file selection, mutation, broad E2E coverage, or testability structure are in scope.
testability-and-selection.md.trigger: testability, selection, slow-test, or mutation-workload review

unit-test-quality.md.rationale: Consult when a quality run reviews per-test-body authoring rather than suite-level economics.
unit-test-quality.md.trigger: unit test body quality or fixture/assertion review
